final_prompt.prompt:
Design a minimalist logo icon for a mobile app called "Spritr".

风格/媒介: flat design, vector, clean lines, high contrast
构图: centered composition, icon mark only — no text
主体:
  a sleek modern bottle being opened
  liquid splash forming a subtle flame or energy wave shape
场景/背景: dark background — black or deep purple
光线/氛围: trendy, youthful, high-energy nightlife vibe — similar to Tinder-style branding
色彩方案: dark background (black or deep purple) with neon accents — electric blue, pink, or green
材质/纹理:
文字(原样):
约束: no typography, no text — icon mark only
避免: realistic textures, gradients, drop shadows, cluttered detail
